workshoptitle: Build & Deploy Custom MCP Servers on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Learn what MCP servers are and what you will build in this workshop

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Provision an OCI Compute Instance
tutorials.description: Create a VM and configure networking for MCP server hosting

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Set Up the Development Environment
tutorials.description: Install Python, create a virtual environment, and install FastMCP

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build Your First MCP Server
tutorials.description: Write a Hello World MCP server with two tools using FastMCP

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Build a Database MCP Server
tutorials.description: Create a production-grade MCP server with Oracle DB tools

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Deploy as a Persistent Service
tutorials.description: Run your MCP server as a systemd service with auto-restart

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Connect to Agent Factory & MCP Clients
tutorials.description: Register your MCP server with Agent Factory, Cline, or Claude Desktop

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to Common Problems and Directions for Receiving Live Help
